3008660.name: NightSong Demo
3008660.description:
NightSong is an "Action-RPG" about a young pilgrim named Tycho.

Tycho lives in a little stage theatre under the ground. It isn't her home. She would like to go to her own home to sleep in her own bed.

However, the omnipresent soul-influence of Inversion-Distortion has started the End Of The World. Inversion-Distortion uses the direct powers of Machines of War and Torture to degrade the Soul of Man, and also uses more subtle Spiritual Warfare in the form of Images, Words, Voices and Visions. What's real and what's delusion?

With Inversion-Distortion's overwhelming presence beating down on her, Tycho must find her way to the Capitol of Lights, her former home.

Gameplay:

NightSong is a top-down game played with the keyboard. You can use the arrow keys to attack enemies with your screwdrivers, and can press shift to dodge.

If you press the Q button you will be stronger for a little while.

Sometimes there are people to talk to, or objects that flash 'images', and things like that. You can press E to interact with them.

There is nothing in the demo that significantly affects the rest of the game, so you'll have the option to skip directly to the next part of the game in the final release. Alternatively, you can pick up from where you last saved.
